name: Relativity Acquisition Corp
business: Relativity Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no current operations and is seeking a target business to combine with.

exposures.sentence: While we initially focused on targets in the legalized cannabis industry, we have also actively explored Business Combination targets in other businesses, industries or geographical locations, including, but not limited to, related industries such as consumer packaged goods, health & wellness, technology, pharmaceuticals, manufacturing, distribution, logistics and brand management.

catalysts.event: Stockholder approval of the business combination agreement with Instinct Brothers Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: On March 25, 2026, we held a special meeting of stockholders (the Meeting ). At the Meeting, the Company s stockholders approved: a proposal to adopt and approve the business combination agreement, dated as of February 28, 2025 (as amended and restated on October 22, 2025), by and among the Company, Relativity Holdings Inc., Instinct Bio Technical Company Inc., parties thereto, as described in more detail in the proxy statement relating to the Meeting.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate an initial Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until February 15, 2027 to consummate an initial Business Combination (subject to further extension with the approval of stockholders pursuant to the Second Amended and Restated Charter, consistent with applicable laws, regulations and stock exchange rules).
